rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §37.115 governs school threat assessment teams and contains no provisions related to property tax exemptions or homestead valuation.
quote: Sec. 37.115. THREAT ASSESSMENT AND SAFE AND SUPPORTIVE SCHOOL PROGRAM AND TEAM.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and Educ. Code §37.115 school safety provisions.
